title: Uutensil Stirr Plus - The Unique Automatic Pan Stirrer with Timer - Rechargeable USB Stand - Grey
description:
Rechargeable automatic stirrer with unique and innovative design - Saves time when you are cooking - There's no need to spend time manually stirring your soups, sauces, porridge, gravy, and more, the stirrer will do the job for you
Hands-free self-rotating with three speed options and a timer function that can be set from 1 to 10 minutes - Simply place it in a pan or pot, push the button to turn it on, and the stirrer will automatically rotate by itself - Push the button again to turn if off
Features removable nylon legs - Heat-resistant up to 120°C, safe for non-stick pans and pots, food and dishwasher safe
Includes USB charging cradle - Dimensions: 2.75 x 1.5 inches with 12 inches length cable - A 2-hour charge provides up to 4 hours of continuous stirring
Stirrer dimensions (without the USB charging stand): 9.5 x 4.72 inches (height x diameter) - Color: grey
reviews_5s:

Of course, if you're not really a good cook... and if the heat is too high, it's still going to burn. I may get another one of these!Continuez à cuisiner, il se s’occupe de votre sauce. reviews_1s: Put on shelve when first bought, charged it then tried it, it ran for maybe 2 minutes then quit.Blue power light on but won’t do anythingThe device came charged, but when it ran out, it wouldn't recharge!! The battery lasts like 10 hours, so by the time it ran out, the return window was closed. Waste of money.For almost $50 and it doesn’t recharge is unacceptable, please send me a replacement!All it did was vibrate in the pan and it did not spin. What a joke!!Save your moneyCan't stir anything thicker than water. Not worth itDoes not have enough power to stir waterpolo!
